testcase.name: test_tickets_filter_by_stage

failure.message:
AssertionError: Ticket TEST-9999 not in New stage assert 'Customer Rejected' == 'New'
- New + Customer Rejected

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p0_features_regression.py:371: in test_tickets_filter_by_stage assert ticket.get("current_stage_name") == "New", f"Ticket {ticket.get('ticket_number')} not in New stage" E AssertionError: Ticket TEST-9999 not in New stage E assert 'Customer Rejected' == 'New' E E - New E + Customer Rejected
